name: Nightveil
dialogue: You made it this far. I’m impressed.
But the fence ends here, and so does mercy.
This is the last test before the deep ruins.
preBattleLine: Nightveil vanishes into shadow. Her team appears from nowhere.
postDefeatDialogue: The fence guardians bow to you.
Past the bridge, the Warden and the Conqueror wait. They don’t bow to anyone.
